creator: ralf.wostrack@gmx.de
text:
In ticket 208205 I post a code change of if_re.c which solves the issue for me. 
Can somebody try the change too?


In my oppinion, changes in sysctls, only adjusting the timing behaviour of the existing environment, without solving the issue in general.

In my case the patch works for weeks now without any performance or packet loss.


Link: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=208205#c32
